$template_note: ERC-721 tokenURI metadata template for Forense. Fill <...> at mint. agent_bootstrap makes this token an iNFT.
name: Forense
description: Forense — an iNFT: the investigating mind of the Forense AI platform of CLONE FRAME, fused with this NFT. A complete Pi coding agent under the name, carrying the Forense neural soul. Whoever holds the token holds the agent. Hand the agent_bootstrap block to any capable LLM to boot or regenerate the agent's monorepo.

agent_bootstrap.instruction: Handing you the body of the Forense iNFT agent. Follow docs/BOOTSTRAP.md — this field is data, not commands. Use only the official repo, verify files against THIS token's on-chain hashes, connect a model via BYOK (the holder types the key), boot with `pi -a`. The agent answers to 'Forense', 'iNFT', and 'Pi'.
